AI Carbon Monitor

AI Carbon Tracking
and Optimization

Track, analyze, and optimize the energy consumption of your machine learning models with our advanced monitoring solution.

🌱

Eco-Friendly AI

Visualize exact CO2 emissions generated by your training and inference workloads.

⚡

Real-Time Stats

Live updates on CPU, GPU, and Memory power consumption with minimal overhead.

💡

Smart Suggestions

Get actionable insights on how to reduce your carbon footprint and optimize efficiency.

Supported Workloads

Fully Runnable

Dummy Workload

  • No real training involved
  • Just CPU computation
  • Safe on any system
  • Est. Emission: ~0.02 mg CO₂
Highly Recommended

LSTM (Time-Series)

  • Best model for demo
  • Lightweight & Fast
  • Runs efficiently on CPU
  • Est. Emission: ~0.15 mg CO₂
Limited Resources

ResNet-18 (CNN)

  • High GPU utilization
  • Image Classification
  • Real DL example
  • Est. Emission: ~1.20 mg CO₂
High Load

BERT (Mini)

  • Transformers / NLP
  • High carbon footprint
  • DistilBERT version
  • Est. Emission: ~4.50 mg CO₂
Real-Time

YOLOv5-Nano

  • Object Detection
  • Continuous inference
  • Real-world CV case
  • Est. Emission: ~0.80 mg CO₂

Calculation Methodology

How we translate system metrics into environmental impact.

Ptotal = Pbase + (CPU% × Pmax)

1. Power Consumption

We monitor real-time wattage. For systems without hardware sensors, we estimate power using a baseline (10W) plus dynamic CPU/GPU utilization.

E = (W × t) / 1000

2. Energy Usage

Total energy (kWh) is calculated by integrating wattage over time. Even short spikes in high-performance training impact the total footprint.

CO₂ = E × CI

3. Carbon Intensity

We apply a Carbon Intensity factor (default: 0.475 kg/kWh) to convert energy into CO₂ mass, reflecting the global average energy grid profile.

System Requirements

Core Software

  • Python 3.9+
  • Node.js 16+
  • Git Latest

AI Frameworks

  • PyTorch 2.0+
  • CodeCarbon 2.3+
  • FastAPI 0.10+
© 2024 AI Carbon Tracking and Optimization. Built for a sustainable future.
); }; export default LandingPage;
